description: AutoMindLab enterprise host and worker topology for OpenClaw-based deployments.

capabilities: Owns front-door channels and operator interaction.
May call external APIs and route to council or specialists.
May delegate isolated execution to automind-worker.
constraints: Must not execute untrusted code directly.
Must not persist business records owned by downstream consumer products.

capabilities: Executes delegated isolated tasks inside the agent sandbox.
May validate structured outputs before returning them to the host.
constraints: Must not accept requests directly from external channels.
Must not become the default agent.
Must not persist business records or bypass host review.

approvalBoundaries: Only the host owns external channel bindings.
Irreversible actions require operator-visible escalation when uncertainty remains high.
Downstream products own persistence and business workflow outcomes.
notes: This profile is validated through repo-side checks and the reusable OpenClaw fixture smoke harness. It does not claim live gateway proof on this machine.
